name: build_2x2_shelter
description: Build a 2x2 oak plank shelter for protection against hostile entities
parameters: z.object({}).describe('No parameters; builds the shelter relative to the bot’s current position')
code: const plankItem = 'oak_planks'; const requiredPlanks = 22; const plankCount = bot.inventory.count(plankItem); if (plankCount < requiredPlanks) { return `<INSUFFICIENT>: Need ${requiredPlanks} oak planks, have ${plankCount}.`; } const movements = new Movements(bot); bot.pathfinder.setMovements(movements); const pos = bot.entity.position; const baseX = Math.floor(pos.x); const baseY = Math.floor(pos.y); const baseZ = Math.floor(pos.z); const shelterPositions = [ new Vec3(baseX-1, baseY+1, baseZ), new Vec3(baseX-1, baseY+2, baseZ), new Vec3(baseX-1, baseY+1, baseZ+1), new Vec3(baseX-1, baseY+2, baseZ+1), new Vec3(baseX+2, baseY+1, baseZ), new Vec3(baseX+2, baseY+2, baseZ), new Vec3(baseX+2, baseY+1, baseZ+1), new Vec3(baseX+2, baseY+2, baseZ+1), new Vec3(baseX, baseY+1, baseZ+2), new Vec3(baseX+1, baseY+1, baseZ+2), new Vec3(baseX, baseY+2, baseZ+2), new Vec3(baseX+1, baseY+2, baseZ+2), new Vec3(baseX, baseY+2, baseZ-1), new Vec3(baseX+1, baseY+2, baseZ-1), new Vec3(baseX-1, baseY+3, baseZ), new Vec3(baseX, baseY+3, baseZ), new Vec3(baseX+1, baseY+3, baseZ), new Vec3(baseX+2, baseY+3, baseZ), new Vec3(baseX-1, baseY+3, baseZ+1), new Vec3(baseX, baseY+3, baseZ+1), new Vec3(baseX+1, baseY+3, baseZ+1), new Vec3(baseX+2, baseY+3, baseZ+1) ]; let placedCount = 0; const directions = [ new Vec3(0, 0, -1), new Vec3(0, 0, 1), new Vec3(-1, 0, 0), new Vec3(1, 0, 0), new Vec3(0, -1, 0), new Vec3(0, 1, 0) ]; for (const targetPos of shelterPositions) { const targetBlock = bot.blockAt(targetPos); if (targetBlock.name !== 'air') continue; await bot.pathfinder.goto(new goals.GoalNear(targetPos.x, targetPos.y, targetPos.z, 2)); let placed = false; for (const dir of directions) { const neighborPos = targetPos.offset(dir.x, dir.y, dir.z); const neighbor = bot.blockAt(neighborPos); if (neighbor.boundingBox !== 'empty') { await bot.equip(plankItem, 'hand'); const faceVector = dir.clone().scale(-1); try { const placedBlock = await bot.placeBlock(neighbor, faceVector); if (placedBlock) { placedCount++; placed = true; break; } } catch (err) { /* ignore */ } } } if (!placed) { console.log('Failed to place at ' + targetPos); } } bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null); return `<BUILT>: 2x2 oak plank shelter using ${placedCount} planks.`;
